steps.title: Use the evidence after the colon
steps.content: The colon introduces evidence that cuttlefish “routinely demonstrated restraint” by delaying gratification. The blank must describe them as successful or capable at exercising self-control.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A contradicts the evidence by suggesting awkwardness. Choice B means creative, which is not shown. Choice C means easy to manage, but the sentence is about the cuttlefish's own ability.

steps.title: Choose the capability word
steps.content: The remaining word means skilled or capable, matching the described self-control. The answer is D.
